_note: National-only NTR and ATR YoY benchmarks, refreshed quarterly from BLS's R-CPI-NTR / R-CPI-ATR XLSX. Used only for dev-facing sanity checks on the Honolulu rent nowcast — the dashboard UI does NOT read this file. See METHODOLOGY.md § 'Quarterly NTR/ATR benchmark refresh' for update steps.
_scope: National, US city average. No Hawaii-specific equivalent exists.
_cadence: quarterly, released ~15th of month following each quarter-end (Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct). Data has a 1-quarter lag.
_refresh_howto: 1. Visit https://www.bls.gov/cpi/research-series/r-cpi-ntr.htm and download the latest R-CPI-NTR and R-CPI-ATR XLSX files.
2. Open each XLSX. The rightmost/latest quarterly column is the just-published release (e.g. '2025Q4').
3. From the same sheet pull the quarter 4 rows back (e.g. 2024Q4). YoY % = (latest / same_quarter_prior_year - 1) * 100.

4. Paste the two YoY percentages into ntr_yoy_pct and atr_yoy_pct. Set latest_quarter to the release quarter (e.g. '2025Q4'). Set last_refreshed to today's ISO date. Set refreshed_by to your name/email.
5. Commit the file in the same PR that bumps any dependent docs; the next updater run will consume the new values.
